entity.label: Shimei
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Ramathite who was “over the vineyards” of David (1 Chr. 27:27).

nodes.label: Shimei
nodes.description: A Ramathite who was “over the vineyards” of David (1 Chr. 27:27).

verses.text: And over the vineyards was Shimei the Ramathite: over the increase of the vineyards for the wine cellars was Zabdi the Shiphmite:
